message:
feat: restructure logs to ~/.llm-provider-logs/<host>/<date>/

Change log file path structure from provider-based to upstream-based with
date directories, making it easier to find and organize logs:

- Old: <baseDir>/<provider>/<sessionID>.jsonl
- New: <baseDir>/<upstream>/<YYYY-MM-DD>/<sessionID>.jsonl

This enables organizing logs by actual upstream host (api.anthropic.com,
api.openai.com, chatgpt.com) and by date for easier navigation.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -73,6 +76,28 @@ func TestLoggerWritesJSONL(t *testing.T) {
 	}
 }
 
+func TestLogPathStructure(t *testing.T) {
+	tmpDir := t.TempDir()
+	logger, _ := NewLogger(tmpDir)
+	defer logger.Close()
+
+	sessionID := "20260114-091523-abcd1234"
+	upstream := "api.anthropic.com"
+
+	logger.LogSessionStart(sessionID, "anthropic", upstream)
+
+	// Wait for async write
+	time.Sleep(50 * time.Millisecond)
+
+	// Expect: tmpDir/api.anthropic.com/2026-01-14/20260114-091523-abcd1234.jsonl
+	today := time.Now().Format("2006-01-02")
+	expectedPath := filepath.Join(tmpDir, upstream, today, sessionID+".jsonl")
+
+	if _, err := os.Stat(expectedPath); os.IsNotExist(err) {
+		t.Errorf("Expected log at %s", expectedPath)
+	}
+}
+
